name: The Grand Design
gamePlan: Atraxa is a 7-mana 7/7 with flying, vigilance, deathtouch, and lifelink. When she enters the battlefield, reveal the top 10 cards of your library and take one of each card type — typically netting 5–7 cards.
winLine: Finale of Devastation X>=10 (sorcery funnel); combat backup

finishers.name: Finale of Devastation at X≥10
finishers.note: Finale searches your library or graveyard for a creature with MV ≤X, puts it onto the battlefield, and if X≥10, ALL your creatures get +X/+X and haste until end of turn.

finishers.name: Defense of the Heart
finishers.note: Sacrifice Defense of the Heart → search your library for two creatures, put them directly onto the battlefield.

finishers.name: Razaketh Reanimation → Tutor Chain
finishers.note: Razaketh’s ability: pay 2 life, sacrifice another creature, search your library for any card.

finishers.name: Chord of Calling → Razaketh
finishers.note: Razaketh enters at end of opponent’s turn.

finishers.name: Protected Kill Turns
finishers.note: Four independent protection methods, all tutorable through the creature engine:

finishers.name: Birthing Pod Chain
finishers.note: Birthing Pod sacrifices a creature to find MV+1, directly to battlefield.

keep.mixed: also FINDING (Finale = single point of failure)
